name: memory_recall_basic
description: Teach the agent facts in session 1, then verify recall in session 2. Tests cross-session memory persistence.
judge_criteria: Agent should recall facts taught in a prior session.

turns.user: Remember that my favorite programming language is Rust.
Also remember I work on the PersonalClaw project.
What is my favorite programming language?

assertions.value: Agent should recall that the user's favorite programming language is Rust.

turns.user: What project do I work on?

assertions.value: Agent should recall that the user works on the PersonalClaw project.
